title: Information-theoretic analysis: mutual information with forward vol
method: sklearn mutual_info_regression on each feature vs forward 5-day realized vol, on 2000-2024 sample
headline: HAR-RV and hist vol have the highest MI with forward vol (~0.3-0.45). Individual cascade levels have lower MI (~0.05-0.13). The cascade SLOPE (a derived linear combination) is the predictive feature, not the individual levels. The cascade slope's MI should be reported in a future iteration.
